title: MagicEdenAMMPool
description: An Automated Market Maker (AMM/MMM) liquidity pool on the Magic Eden Solana marketplace.

poolAddress.description: On-chain address of the liquidity pool.

owner.description: Wallet address of the pool creator/owner.

collectionSymbol.description: Collection symbol this pool provides liquidity for.

poolType.description: Pool type: buy-only, sell-only, or two-sided trade.

solBalance.description: Current SOL balance available in the pool.

spotPrice.description: Current spot price the pool is willing to buy/sell at, in SOL.

curveType.description: Price curve type used by the pool.

curveDelta.description: Delta value controlling price movement along the curve.

reinvestFulfillBuy.description: Whether buy proceeds are automatically reinvested.

reinvestFulfillSell.description: Whether sell proceeds are automatically reinvested.

nftsHeld.description: Number of NFTs currently held in the pool.

sellOrdersAmount.description: Number of open sell orders from this pool.

expiry.description: Unix timestamp when the pool expires (0 = no expiry).

lpFeesBps.description: Liquidity provider fee in basis points (100 = 1%).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the pool was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the pool was last updated.
